GYM LAUNCH 2.0

Announcements
$10 Versus pitch
make the life and in-person announcements
Next Topic →
Topic Progress:
← Back to Lesson
The point is to make RIDICULOUS comparisons of what someone can get for $10 VERSUS the
total life and body transforming effects of being at your gym.
You’ll swap out “SANDWICH” for whatever crazy thing the trainers come up with.
Facebook Live/Video Post Text FORMAT
HEADLINE: Is transforming your family and friends bodies forever worth more than a
SANDWICH???
BODY: It better be…and on Black Friday, and Black Friday ONLY from 5am to 12pm we are going
to let you transform your friends and family for less than the price of a SANDWICH.
OFFER: $100 gift cards for $10 ONLY. LIMIT 5 Per Person OR Until We Run OUT!
CTA & NEXT STEPS: Just text us back that morning when the promotion goes live to lock in your
90% off $100 gift cards.
Download Crazy $10 Ideas
CLICK HERE
Mark Complete
00:00 	04:36
